scripts.postinstall: node scripts/postinstall.mjs || echo 'Postinstall skipped - run manually'
scripts.validate:all: npm run validate:phase1 && npm run validate:phase3
scripts.build: npm run check:encoding && npm run frontend:build
scripts.build:full: npm run check:encoding && npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build
scripts.build:prod: npm run check:encoding && npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build
scripts.start:prod-full: npm run prisma:migrate:prod && npm run build:full && npm run start:prod
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:prod: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.monitor:check: node -e "fetch('http://127.0.0.1:3001/metrics').then(async (response) => { if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Metrics endpoint unavailable'); const text = await response.text(); if (!text.includes('http_requests_total')) throw new Error('Missing Prometheus request metrics'); if (!text.includes('process_uptime_seconds')) throw new Error('Missing Prometheus uptime metrics'); console.log('monitoring:ok'); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error.message); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.verify:visual:load: npm run build:full && npm run monitor:check && npm run test:e2e:login
scripts.verify:absolute:proof: npm run build:full && npm run monitor:check && npm run test:e2e:login
scripts.deploy:prod: docker compose up -d --build && npm run health-check && npm run monitor:check
scripts.db:sync: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:dev
